scenes.description: Performance of the song "Paradise Lost" concludes with a dramatic pose.
Instrumental transition as more members join the stage.
Performance of "Girls' Legend U" with a large ensemble cast.

subtitles.original: 離さない
subtitles.english: I won't let go

subtitles.original: 見つめて Paradise Lost
subtitles.english: Gaze into Paradise Lost

subtitles.original: Wow wow...
subtitles.english: Wow wow...

subtitles.original: やっとみんな会えたね！
subtitles.english: Finally, we could all meet!

subtitles.original: GIRLS' LEGEND U
subtitles.english: GIRLS' LEGEND U

subtitles.original: Don't stop, non-stop the finish!
subtitles.english: Don't stop, non-stop the finish!

subtitles.original: たったったっ 全力 走りたい
subtitles.english: Tattatta, I want to run at full speed

subtitles.original: 芝と 砂と 君の 追い切りメニュー
subtitles.english: Turf, dirt, and your final training menu

subtitles.original: タナ タナ 声出せ 叫べ
subtitles.english: Tana tana, raise your voice and shout

subtitles.original: Oh oh...
subtitles.english: Oh oh...

subtitles.original: とりゃあ！ ハイ！ オイ！ ハイ！ オイ！
subtitles.english: Toryah! Hai! Oi! Hai! Oi!

subtitles.original: たったったっ 全力 上がりたい
subtitles.english: Tattatta, I want to rise at full speed

subtitles.original: 譲れない 夢の 途中
subtitles.english: In the middle of a dream I can't give up

subtitles.original: Wow wow... 始めよう ここから最高のストーリー
subtitles.english: Wow wow... Let's start the best story from here

subtitles.original: Oh oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Oh oh oh oh...

subtitles.original: あぁ 憧れの地へ
subtitles.english: Ah, toward the land of yearning

subtitles.original: 語り合ったメモリー
subtitles.english: The memories we shared together

subtitles.original: もうドキドキもトキメキも 抑えられないたまんない
subtitles.english: I can't contain the pounding heart and excitement anymore

subtitles.original: 熱いハラハラが止まらない！
subtitles.english: The hot suspense won't stop!

subtitles.original: 君と 走り競いゴール目指し
subtitles.english: With you, running and competing toward the goal

subtitles.original: 遥か響け届けミュージック
subtitles.english: Resonate and reach far, music

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い 夢がきっと叶うなら
subtitles.english: If the feelings and dreams I've always held surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日君に感じた 何かを信じて
subtitles.english: Believing in something I felt from you that day

subtitles.original: 春も夏も秋も冬も声 描き焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Spring, summer, autumn, and winter voices, run toward the yearning we drew

subtitles.original: あぁ 勝利へ！
subtitles.english: Ah, toward victory!

subtitles.original: Don't stop, non-stop the finish!
subtitles.english: Don't stop, non-stop the finish!

subtitles.original: たったったっ 全力 弾けたい
subtitles.english: Tattatta, I want to burst at full speed

subtitles.original: 大出会い 決意 絆になった
subtitles.english: A great encounter, a determination that became a bond

subtitles.original: ハンザ ハンザ 本気で 叫べ
subtitles.english: Hands up, hands up, shout with all your heart

subtitles.original: Oh oh...
subtitles.english: Oh oh...

subtitles.original: とりゃあ！ ハイ！ オイ！ ハイ！ オイ！
subtitles.english: Toryah! Hai! Oi! Hai! Oi!

subtitles.original: たったったっ 全力 笑いたい
subtitles.english: Tattatta, I want to laugh at full speed

subtitles.original: カフス ロゴ 真ん中
subtitles.english: Cuffs, logo, right in the center

subtitles.original: Wow wow... リアルに ここから上昇ストーリー
subtitles.english: Wow wow... A rising story from here in reality

subtitles.original: Oh oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Oh oh oh oh...

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けた日々
subtitles.english: The days we ran through

subtitles.original: 語り合ったグローリー
subtitles.english: The glory we talked about together

subtitles.original: 今 答えたい 生きてると 背中押す声 熱くなる
subtitles.english: I want to answer now that I'm alive, the voices pushing my back become hot

subtitles.original: 夢は夢のまま 終われない！
subtitles.english: A dream cannot end as just a dream!

subtitles.original: 君と 未来描きゴール目指し
subtitles.english: With you, drawing the future toward the goal

subtitles.original: 狙い定め掴めウィニング
subtitles.english: Take aim and seize the winning

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い 夢はきっと叶うから
subtitles.english: Because the feelings and dreams I've always held will surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日君が鳴らした 涙も信じて
subtitles.english: Believing even in the tears you shed that day

subtitles.original: 雨も風も雲も闇も声 描き焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Rain, wind, clouds, and darkness, voices run toward the yearning we drew

subtitles.original: あぁ 勝利へ！
subtitles.english: Ah, toward victory!

subtitles.original: 揺るぎない覚悟決して
subtitles.english: With unwavering determination

subtitles.original: 一つ二つ共に綴る記録
subtitles.english: One, two, records we write together

subtitles.original: 背中に迫る迷い振り払え 今の自分追い越すだけ
subtitles.english: Shake off the hesitation closing in behind, just overtake your current self

subtitles.original: 勝ちたい！ 勝ちたい！ 勝ちたい！ 君と勝ちたい！
subtitles.english: I want to win! I want to win! I want to win! I want to win with you!

subtitles.original: はーい！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: 未来描きゴール目指し
subtitles.english: Drawing the future toward the goal

subtitles.original: 狙い定め掴めウィニング
subtitles.english: Take aim and seize the winning

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い 夢はきっと叶うから
subtitles.english: Because the feelings and dreams I've always held will surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日君が鳴らした 涙も信じて
subtitles.english: Believing even in the tears you shed that day

subtitles.original: 春も夏も秋も冬も声 雨も風も超え
subtitles.english: Spring, summer, autumn, and winter voices, over the rain and wind

subtitles.original: 雲も闇も超え 勝利へ
subtitles.english: Over the clouds and darkness, to victory

subtitles.original: 君と
subtitles.english: With you

subtitles.original: 走り競いゴール目指し
subtitles.english: Running and competing toward the goal

subtitles.original: 遥か響け届けミュージック
subtitles.english: Resonate and reach far, music

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い 夢がきっと叶うなら
subtitles.english: If the feelings and dreams I've always held surely come true

subtitles.original: あの日君に感じた 何かを信じて
subtitles.english: Believing in something I felt from you that day
